zh.lifeSummary: 當Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag於1515年出生在蘇格蘭可洛馬迪夏爾時，他的父親Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag31歲，母親Lady Margaret Munro32歲。他和Anne MacDonald至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1571年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾享年56歲。

nameMeanings.name: Mackenzie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Kinsey
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Kynsey (Old English Cynesige from cyne- ‘royal’ + sige ‘victory’).
Possibly also an Americanized form of Swiss German Künzi (see Kuenzi ).

History: The paternal grandfather of NJ and PA legislator John Kinsey (1693–1750) was one of the commissioners sent out from England in 1677 by the West Jersey proprietors to buy land from the Indians and to lay out a town. John was the leader of the Quaker party in the PA assembly and chief justice of the PA supreme court.

variants.name: McKenzie
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Coinnich, a patronymic from the personal name Coinneach meaning ‘comely’, Anglicized as Kenneth. Compare the Irish form McKinney 2. The Scottish spelling with -z- indicates palatalization of the -n- (compare Menzies ).

History: This is the name of a Scottish Highland clan, historically associated with the mountainous district of Kintail in nortwestern Scotland, with Cromarty, and with Loch Seaforth (Loch Shiphoirt) on the Island of Harris.

nameMeanings.name: Roderick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. This name was introduced into England, in slightly different forms, first by Scandinavian settlers in the Danelaw and later by the Normans. However, it did not survive beyond the Middle English period. It owes its modern use to a poem by Sir Walter Scott , The Vision of Don Roderick ( 1811 ), where it is an Anglicized form of the related Spanish name Rodrigo, borne by the last Visigothic king of Spain, whose vision is the subject of the poem. It is now also very commonly used as an Anglicized form of two unrelated Celtic names: Scottish Gaelic Ruairidh and Welsh Rhydderch (see respective appendices).

en.lifeSummary: When Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag was born in 1515, in Cromartyshire, Scotland, his father, Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag, was 31 and his mother, Lady Margaret Munro, was 32. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Anne MacDonald. He died in 1571, in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 56.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag est né en 1515, à Cromartyshire, Écosse, son père, Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Lady Margaret Munro, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Anne MacDonald. Il est décédé en 1571, à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 56 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag 1515 in Cromartyshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag 31 und seine Mutter Lady Margaret Munro 32. Er hatte mit Anne MacDonald mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1571 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag è nato il nel 1515 nel Cromartyshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Lady Margaret Munro, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Anne MacDonald. Morì nel 1571, nel Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 56 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag(이)가 1515년 스컷랜드 크로마티실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Margaret Munro(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Anne MacDonald(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1571년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roderick Mackenzie 2nd of Davochmaluag родился в 1515 г. в местности кромертишир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Alexander Mackenzie of Kintail - 1st of Davochmaluag было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Margaret Munro, 32. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Anne MacDonald. Он умер в 1571 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 56 лет.
